transcription.text: Look at our son. College boy. I'm so proud of him. I'm just glad to be home. You know what I miss most? Golden Grahams. I think I'm gonna have a bowl when I get home. Maybe two. Heck, I might eat them all. The irresistible taste of Golden Grahams is something everyone in the family wants for themselves. Golden Grahams. Go get your own.
